title: Iran talks to begin Sunday in Switzerland, Tehran says Hormuz closed over Lebanon fighting

snapshot.title: Iran talks to begin Sunday in Switzerland, Tehran says Hormuz closed over Lebanon fighting
snapshot.description: TYRE, Lebanon: Iran dealt two quick blows to the interim agreement with the United States on Saturday, angered by Israel’s continued attacks in Lebanon, saying it had closed the Strait of Hormuz and also announcing that while its negotiators were going to Switzerland for talks, not much is likely to happen there. Key mediator Pakistan, meanwhile, said the technical-level talks
snapshot.author: AP
snapshot.pageTitle: Iran talks to begin Sunday in Switzerland, Tehran says Hormuz closed over Lebanon fighting | Arab News
